query: SELECT sm.id, sm.stock_item_id, sm.type, sm.quantity, sm.previous_quantity, sm.new_quantity, sm.reason, sm.created_at FROM stock_movements sm JOIN stock_items si ON sm.stock_item_id = si.id WHERE si.establishment_id = 30001 ORDER BY sm.created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
